summary.headline: Bunge extends exchange offers for Viterra notes until April 7, 2025.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. has extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's notes from March 7, 2025, to April 7, 2025.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. is extending the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's notes.
